# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
  - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
  - '[[ -f /.dockerenv ]] && echo -e "Host *\n\tStrictHostKeyChecking no\n\n" > ~/.ssh/config'

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Building with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Building commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 week

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Testing with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Testing with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
  dependencies:
    - build_job

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Deploying with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Creating tag with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        git tag "release-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        git push origin "release-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      fi
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE" ]; then
        echo "Commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
  only:
    - main
  tags:
    - deploy
  dependencies:
    - test_job

notify_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Notification: Deploying feature '$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE'"
        echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        echo "Commit: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  when: on_success
  dependencies:
    - deploy_job

release_notes_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      echo "Generating release notes"
      echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
      echo "Commit Message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
      echo "Release Notes:"
      echo "================"
      echo "Feature: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
      echo "Deployed by: $CI_COMMIT_AUTHOR"
      echo "Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Generated release notes for MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  dependencies:
    - deploy_job
